item.title: In the $3 trillion private credit market, the ‘shadow default’ rate is increasing as more money chases lower-quality deals
item.description: A decline in interest rates offered by the Fed plus excessive demand for private credit investments has reduced yields for investors.

item.title: NASA delays moon mission to fix rocket, rules out March launch
item.description: NASA engineers found an interruption in the flow of helium — which is needed for launch — in the rocket.

item.title: DOJ probes Netflix’s power over filmmakers in Warner deal review
item.description: It's the clearest sign yet that the Trump administration is going beyond a standard deal review as it investigates the merger.

item.title: JPMorgan admits for the first time it closed Trump’s accounts after the Jan. 6 attack as lender fights his $5 billion ‘debanking’ lawsuit
item.description: “In February 2021, JPMorgan informed Plaintiffs that certain accounts maintained with JPMorgan’s CB and PB would be closed.”

item.title: Trump’s sudden decision to hike his new tariff rate to 15% is ‘something of an eff you’ to the U.K., which thought it had a better deal for 10%
item.description: "It also means some of America’s biggest trading partners, like the EU and Japan, will find themselves exactly back where they were last week."
